title: chiliadenus iphionoides
intro: Chiliadenus iphionoides, also known as the false savory or false chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Chiliadenus iphionoides include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Chiliadenus iphionoides can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
